The terrifying creature who cursed her only told her she could lift the curse with True Love’s Kiss. Desperate to escape her lonely existence, she heads out hoping she could find someone awake. Among the cryptids and creatures creeping out as mankind sleeps, Eva stops at a gas station and finds Will, her friend who skipped town after she broke his heart… But if True Love’s Kiss will wake everyone up, how could she find love with someone who doesn’t love her back?</p>

The rules are simple: You can not escape unless you leave with the person you came in with, but as Connor and Bridget discover, finding your partner is not so easy when there are dozens of copies of them wandering the old western grounds of Nonesuch… Itching to become more and more like their hosts- questioning them and stalking them to learn more about who they are. Connor and Bridget may know each other, but they’re about to learn just how little they know about themselves.</p>

<div id="generate-section-2" class="generate-sections-container">
<div class="grid-container grid-parent generate-sections-inside-container" itemprop="text">
<h2 style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-size: 32px;">Our Projects</span></h2>
<div class="row-fluid" style="text-align: center;">
<div class="rhcol span4">
<p class="wow fadeInLeft"><img decoding="async" class="hvr-grow aligncenter wp-image-6528" src="https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/la-new-2025-cover.png" alt="" width="490" height="730" data-wpmflightbox="0" data-wpmf_image_lightbox="https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/la-new-2025-cover.png" srcset="https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/la-new-2025-cover.png 1947w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/la-new-2025-cover-201x300.png 201w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/la-new-2025-cover-687x1024.png 687w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/la-new-2025-cover-101x150.png 101w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/la-new-2025-cover-768x1144.png 768w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/la-new-2025-cover-1031x1536.png 1031w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/la-new-2025-cover-1375x2048.png 1375w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/la-new-2025-cover-300x447.png 300w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/la-new-2025-cover-600x894.png 600w" sizes="(max-width: 490px) 100vw, 490px" data-mwl-img-id="6528" /></p>
<h3><strong>What if you were the only person awake?</strong></h3>
<p>Eva was cursed, and all of humanity fell into a deep sleep. The terrifying creature who cursed her only told her she could lift the curse with True Love’s Kiss. Desperate to escape her lonely existence, she heads out hoping she could find someone awake. Among the cryptids and creatures creeping out as mankind sleeps, Eva stops at a gas station and finds Will, her friend who skipped town after she broke his heart… But if True Love’s Kiss will wake everyone up, how could she find love with someone who doesn’t love her back?</p>
<p><a class="wpe-button wpe-button-white" href="https://bitsycomics.com/lonely-awake/"><span style="color: #000000;"><strong>Read</strong></span></a></p>
</div>
<div class="rhcol span4">
<p class="wow fadeIn"><a title="Nonesuch" href="https://bitsycomics.com/nonesuch/"><img decoding="async" class="alignnone size-full wp-image-4590 hvr-grow" src="https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/story-title-nonesuch.png" alt="" width="490" height="730" srcset="https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/story-title-nonesuch.png 490w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/story-title-nonesuch-201x300.png 201w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/story-title-nonesuch-101x150.png 101w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/story-title-nonesuch-300x447.png 300w" sizes="(max-width: 490px) 100vw, 490px" data-mwl-img-id="4590" /></a></p>
<h3><strong>How would you match up against <em>yourself</em>?</strong></h3>
<p>Welcome to the town of Nonesuch. The rules are simple: You can not escape unless you leave with the person you came in with, but as Connor and Bridget discover, finding your partner is not so easy when there are dozens of copies of them wandering the old western grounds of Nonesuch… Itching to become more and more like their hosts- questioning them and stalking them to learn more about who they are. Connor and Bridget may know each other, but they’re about to learn just how little they know about themselves.</p>
<p><a class="wpe-button wpe-button-white" href="https://bitsycomics.com/nonesuch/"><span style="color: #000000;"><strong>Read</strong></span></a></p>
</div>
<div class="rhcol span4">
<h3><a href="https://bitsycomics.com/upcoming-developing-projects/"><img decoding="async" class="aligncenter wp-image-6519  hvr-grow-shadow" src="https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/upcoming-projects.png" alt="" width="490" height="730" data-wpmflightbox="0" data-wpmf_image_lightbox="https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/upcoming-projects.png" srcset="https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/upcoming-projects.png 1947w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/upcoming-projects-201x300.png 201w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/upcoming-projects-687x1024.png 687w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/upcoming-projects-101x150.png 101w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/upcoming-projects-768x1144.png 768w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/upcoming-projects-1031x1536.png 1031w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/upcoming-projects-1375x2048.png 1375w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/upcoming-projects-300x447.png 300w, https://bitsycomics.com/wp-content/uploads/upcoming-projects-600x894.png 600w" sizes="(max-width: 490px) 100vw, 490px" data-mwl-img-id="6519" /></a><br />
<strong>See Our Upcoming &amp; Developing Projects</strong></h3>
<p>There&#8217;s a couple other projects that we&#8217;re storyboarding, outlining, drawing, and getting ahead of schedule on. Get a bit of glimpse into what&#8217;s in the works and what&#8217;s coming next.</p>
<p><a class="wpe-button wpe-button-white" href="https://bitsycomics.com/upcoming-developing-projects/"><span style="color: #000000;"><strong>Check it Out</strong></span></a></p>
</div>
</div>
